Tour Planning

Tour Planning Wizard

Use the primary manager desktop planner to turn citizen-driven demand and supporting context into a route plan. The planning service applies nearest-neighbor plus 2-opt from the selected zone depot, then tour creation persists the resulting route.

Tour name
Scheduled date/time

Uses your local time and also avoids containers already reserved on nearby tours for the selected schedule.

Citizen Reporting

Report Container Issue

Opening this feature prepares the reporting workspace, loads mapped containers and zones, then lets you send a typed signal into the manager queue.

EcoTrack is mobile-first for citizens. This web flow stays available for accessibility, demo, and fallback use cases. Citizens report issues on existing mapped containers only, and web GPS remains optional.

Find a mapped container

Search the live mapped-container list if the nearest container is not obvious.

pagesProof.textPreview:
EcoTrack Documentation

EcoTrack est un projet de gestion et de coordination de signalements, tournées et opérations liées aux déchets urbains. Ce portail regroupe la documentation technique, les guides produit, les runbooks et le dossier de preuves Bloc A2 destiné au jury.

Parcourir la documentation complète
Consulter le dossier de preuves - Bloc A2
Voir le repository GitHub
Voir l'application déployée
